description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with white stripes and random appliqués near the chestFittingRegularWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking and remove promptly5. Line dry inside out in shade.6. Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryIt's all fun 'n' frolic with this red tee from disney's collection. While the random cartoon graphics of an anchor, a steam boat and mickey are so true-to-life with the activities your child is involved in, mickey joins him in all the fun. Team this tee with denim or cargo shorts or trousers and your handsome young man is all set for a fun evening, while the cotton fabric keeps him dry and comfortable through all seasons. Add on a pair of comfortable and well ventilated footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra to give him that absolute comfort in style.
